sections.content:
Looking at the image, the player is still at rows 18-23 (the magenta square). The path is still connected to the Red square. The Blue square is at rows 31-34. The Green square is at rows 37-40. The player didn't move DOWN as expected.
Wait, looking at the image, the player is at rows 18-23. The path is still connected to the Red square. The Blue square is at rows 31-34. The Green square is at rows 37-40.
It seems the player didn't move DOWN. Or maybe the DOWN doesn't work when the player is at the bottom of the vertical bar? Let me check the ascii to see the current state.
Actually, I think the issue is that the player can only move within the vertical bar on the left side. The vertical bar is the track where the player can move. The player is constrained to move within this track.
